'''gamojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foenngreek|foenngreek]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foenngreek|foenngreek]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gamojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæmejeth|gæmejeth]] || [[word:gæmejej|gæmejej]] || [[word:gæmejesh|gæmejesh]] || [[word:gæmeje|gæmeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamomojoth|gamomojoth]] || [[word:gamomojoj|gamomojoj]] || [[word:gamomojosh|gamomojosh]] || [[word:gamomojo|gamomojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamojoth|gamojoth]] || [[word:gamojoj|gamojoj]] || [[word:gamojosh|gamojosh]] || [[word:gamojo|gamojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamofjoth|gamofjoth]] || [[word:gamofjoj|gamofjoj]] || [[word:gamofjosh|gamofjosh]] || [[word:gamofjof|gamofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gamojotho|gamojotho]] || [[word:gamojojo|gamojojo]] || [[word:gamojosho|gamojosho]] || [[word:gamojoko|gamojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gamojoth|gamojoth]] || [[word:gamojoj|gamojoj]] || [[word:gamojosh|gamojosh]] || [[word:gamojo|gamojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gamojothol|gamojothol]] || [[word:gamojojol|gamojojol]] || [[word:gamojoshol|gamojoshol]] || [[word:gamojokol|gamojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gamojothotho|gamojothotho]] || [[word:gamojojojo|gamojojojo]] || [[word:gamojoshosho|gamojoshosho]] || [[word:gamojoko|gamojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gamojothon|gamojothon]] || [[word:gamojojon|gamojojon]] || [[word:gamojoshon|gamojoshon]] || [[word:gamojokon|gamojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gamojothoro|gamojothoro]] || [[word:gamojojoro|gamojojoro]] || [[word:gamojoshoro|gamojoshoro]] || [[word:gamojokoro|gamojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
